parameters.subject: =Your Side Hustle Command Centre is ready, {{ $json.intake.buyer_name }}!
parameters.htmlContent:
=

Side Hustle Command Centre

Your command centre for
{{ $json.intake.business_name }} is ready.

Everything has been built around your answers — your launch runway, 30-day content calendar, pricing guide, and AI business coach are all set up and waiting for you.

Open Your Command Centre →

What's inside:

  • ✅ Personalized launch runway (4 phases, specific to your business)
  • 📱 30-day content calendar for {{ $json.intake.platforms.join(', ') }}
  • 💰 Money tracker with your startup cost breakdown
  • ⚡ Offer card + 3-tier pricing guide
  • 🤖 AI coach with 50 free messages (already knows your business)

Your private link:
{{ $json.workspace_url }}

Bookmark this link — it's your new business HQ. No login required.

— The Steady System

Questions? Reply to this email or reach us at hello@sidehustlecommandcentre.com
